nasb.text: Then Jeremiah said to all the people, including all the women, “Hear the word of the Lord, all Judah who are in the land of Egypt,

esv.text: Jeremiah said to all the people and all the women, “Hear the word of the Lord, all you of Judah who are in the land of Egypt.

cnv.text: 耶利米又對眾民和眾婦女說：“在埃及地所有的猶大人哪，要聽耶和華的話！

ccb.text: 耶利米又对在场的男女说：“你们住在埃及的犹大人都要听耶和华的话。
